title: Vanilla AIOTs
body:
[Porting information for 26.1 update](https://wiki.chaotictrials.de/porting/version/26.1/) **[![#StandWithUkraine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vshymanskyy/StandWithUkraine/main/banner2-direct.svg)](https://vshymanskyy.github.io/StandWithUkraine)** ![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/vanilla-aiots/header.png)
![Overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/vanilla-aiots/overview.png)
Always wanted a tool for all blocks? Here you are, All In One Tools! It's an axe, pickaxe, hoe, shovel, and sword combined into one single tool!
Known from [AIOT Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/aiot-botania), but this time for vanilla materials.
If you install [MoreVanillaTools](https://modrinth.com/mod/morevanillatools), there are additional materials available!

![Creative Tab](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/vanilla-aiots/creative_tab.png)
Requires [LibX](https://modrinth.com/mod/libx) being installed.
Install [MoreVanillaLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/morevanillalib) for additional information in game.

![Recipes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/vanilla-aiots/recipes.png) **Wood** ![Recipe](https://github.com/MelanX/VanillaAIOTs/raw/HEAD/images/recipes/wooden_aiot.png)
**Bone** (with MoreVanillaTools installed) ![Recipe](https://github.com/MelanX/VanillaAIOTs/raw/HEAD/images/recipes/bone_aiot.png) You are allowed to put this mod in any modpack you like. ![[Werbung](https://www.bisecthosting.com/melanx)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/vanilla-aiots/promo.png) #Werbung #Ad
